Category.Name: CameraAndIlluminationControl
Category.ToolTip: Camera and Illumination Controller features set

Category.Name: FreeRunGrabberControl
Category.ToolTip: Camera and Illumination Controller features set

String.Name: InterfaceID
String.ToolTip: GenTL Producer wide unique identifier of the selected interface
String.Description: GenTL Producer wide unique identifier of the selected interface.

Enumeration.Name: InterfaceType
Enumeration.ToolTip: Identifies the transport layer technology of the interface
Enumeration.Description: Identifies the transport layer technology of the interface.

EnumEntry.Name: CXP
EnumEntry.Description: This enumeration value indicates CoaXPress transport layer technology.

Integer.Name: DeviceSelector
Integer.ToolTip: Selector for the different devices on this interface
Integer.Description: Selector for the different devices on this interface.

String.Name: DeviceID
String.ToolTip: Interface wide unique identifier of the selected device
String.Description: Interface wide unique identifier of the selected device.

Enumeration.Name: DeviceAccessStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Gives the device's access status at the moment of the last execution of DeviceUpdateList
Enumeration.Description: Gives the device's access status at the moment of the last execution of DeviceUpdateList.

EnumEntry.Name: ReadWrite
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Available to be opened with full access
EnumEntry.Description: Available to be opened with full access.

EnumEntry.Name: ReadOnly
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Available to be opened with read-only access
EnumEntry.Description: Available to be opened with read-only access.

Enumeration.Name: FirmwareMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to get info
Enumeration.Description: Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to get info.

Command.Name: CxpPoCxpAuto
Command.ToolTip: Activate automatic control of the Power over CoaXPress (PoCXP)
Command.Description: Activate automatic control of the Power over CoaXPress (PoCXP).

Enumeration.Name: CxpConnectionSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to get info
Enumeration.Description: Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to get info.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpCurrentA
Float.ToolTip: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpCurrentB
Float.ToolTip: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpCurrentC
Float.ToolTip: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpCurrentD
Float.ToolTip: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpVoltageA
Float.ToolTip: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpVoltageB
Float.ToolTip: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpVoltageC
Float.ToolTip: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Float.Name: CxpPoCxpVoltageD
Float.ToolTip: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection
Float.Description: Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection.

Integer.Name: CxpStreamDataPacketCrcError_A
Integer.ToolTip: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection
Integer.Description: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection.
Integer.DisplayName: CoaXPress Link A Lock Loss Count

Integer.Name: CxpStreamDataPacketCrcError_B
Integer.ToolTip: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection
Integer.Description: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection.
Integer.DisplayName: CoaXPress Link B Lock Loss Count

Integer.Name: CxpStreamDataPacketCrcError_C
Integer.ToolTip: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection
Integer.Description: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection.
Integer.DisplayName: CoaXPress Link C Lock Loss Count

Integer.Name: CxpStreamDataPacketCrcError_D
Integer.ToolTip: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection
Integer.Description: Reports the count of connection lock losses on the selected Host connection.
Integer.DisplayName: CoaXPress Link D Lock Loss Count

Command.Name: CxpInfo_Update
Command.ToolTip: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Update
Command.Description: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Update.
Command.DisplayName: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Update

Command.Name: CxpStreamDataPacketCrcError_Reset
Command.ToolTip: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Reset
Command.Description: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Reset.
Command.DisplayName: CoaXPress Stream Data Packet Crc Error Count Reset

Category.Name: IfUserSetControl
Category.ToolTip: Category that contains the User Set control features.
Category.Description: Category that contains the User Set control features.

Enumeration.Name: IfUserSetSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the feature User Set to load, save or configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the feature User Set to load, save or configure.

Command.Name: IfUserSetLoad
Command.ToolTip: Loads the User Set specified by IfUserSetSelector to the device and makes it active.
Command.Description: Loads the User Set specified by IfUserSetSelector to the device and makes it active.

Command.Name: IfUserSetSave
Command.ToolTip: Save the User Set specified by IfUserSetSelector to the non-volatile memory of the device.
Command.Description: Save the User Set specified by IfUserSetSelector to the non-volatile memory of the device.

Enumeration.Name: IfUserSetDefault
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the feature User Set to load and make active by default when the device is reset.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the feature User Set to load and make active by default when the device is reset.

Port.Name: InterfacePort
Port.ToolTip: The port through which the Device module is accessed
Port.Description: The port through which the Device module is accessed.

Integer.Name: StreamSelector
Integer.ToolTip: Selector for the different stream channels
Integer.Description: Selector for the different stream channels.

String.Name: StreamID
String.ToolTip: Device unique ID for the stream
String.Description: Device unique ID for the stream.

EnumEntry.Name: Software
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Software Grabber-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time
EnumEntry.Description: Software Grabber-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time.

EnumEntry.Name: Hardware
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Externally-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time
EnumEntry.Description: Externally-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time.

EnumEntry.Name: HardwareLevel
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Externally-controlled cycle start with IO Level
EnumEntry.Description: Externally-controlled cycle start with IO Level.

EnumEntry.Name: HardwareTrigger
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Externally-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time
EnumEntry.Description: Externally-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time.

Float.Name: DeviceFramePeriod
Float.ToolTip: Controls the acquisition rate (in 1us steps) at which the frames are captured.
Float.Description: Controls the acquisition rate (in 1us steps) at which the frames are captured.

Command.Name: DeviceTriggerStart
Command.ToolTip: Starts the trigger of the device.

EnumEntry.Name: RGB
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Software Grabber-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time
EnumEntry.Description: Software Grabber-controlled cycle start with pulse number and exposure time.

Command.Name: FRGrabberRestart
Command.ToolTip: Starts the trigger of the device.

Command.Name: FRGrabberReset
Command.ToolTip: Starts the trigger of the device.

Integer.Name: Timestamp
Integer.ToolTip: current value(in 1ns steps) of the device timestamp counter.
Integer.Description: current value(in 1ns steps) of the device timestamp counter.

Category.Name: DevUserSetControl
Category.ToolTip: Category that contains the User Set control features.
Category.Description: Category that contains the User Set control features.

Enumeration.Name: DevUserSetSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the feature User Set to load, save or configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the feature User Set to load, save or configure.

Command.Name: DevUserSetLoad
Command.ToolTip: Loads the User Set specified by DevUserSetSelector to the device and makes it active.
Command.Description: Loads the User Set specified by DevUserSetSelector to the device and makes it active.

Command.Name: DevUserSetSave
Command.ToolTip: Save the User Set specified by DevUserSetSelector to the non-volatile memory of the device.
Command.Description: Save the User Set specified by DevUserSetSelector to the non-volatile memory of the device.

Enumeration.Name: DevUserSetDefault
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the feature User Set to load and make active by default when the device is reset.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the feature User Set to load and make active by default when the device is reset.

Integer.Name: TLParamsLocked
Integer.ToolTip: Integer parameter: 1 when grabbing, 0 when not
